description: German startup providing team scheduling and workforce management for healthcare organizations. Focuses on nurse and doctor scheduling, shift planning, and absence management.
business_model: B2B - SaaS subscription to hospitals, clinics, and care facilities
target_market: German healthcare organizations, expanding to DACH region
competitive_advantage: Purpose-built for healthcare, AI optimization, German market focus

varden_fit.rationale: Complementary infrastructure tool - could enhance Varden's practice management capabilities
